pages.text: Four boss resources - Wither Skeleton Skull, Nether Star, Dragon Egg, and Dragon's Breath - sit at the top of the tree. Their slimes are prime-only: they never appear from ordinary splits, you must prime them deliberately.
A boss Slime Milk source spawns nothing until its matching catalyst block walls it in on all six faces - a catalyst altar. Build the altar to switch the source on.

Boss Slime Milk is toxic: standing in it inflicts Wither, which is why you seal it behind the altar. The slimes it spawns are unharmed, and creative players are immune.$(br2)Boss Froglights feed the endgame crafts, like the Froglight Cleaver.
